---
title: "Part 1: Fundamentals of Deep Learning"
author: jshn9515
date: 2026-05-05
date-modified: today
comments: false

listing:
  contents:
    - ch1-introduction/*.qmd
    - ch2-pytorch-introduction/*.qmd
  sort: title asc
  type: table
  fields: [title, author, date]
  date-format: iso

open-graph:
  title: part1-fundamentals-of-deep-learning
  description: "Part 1: Fundamentals of Deep Learning"
---
